title: Agentic Engineering
description: Build, orchestrate, and secure autonomous AI agents for real-world software delivery using Google Antigravity and the tridorian standard.

courses.title: AGY-101: Setup & Initialization
courses.description: Welcome to the foundational session of Google Antigravity. Establish a secure working environment, configure cloud credentials, run diagnostic checks, and select the correct installation tier.

courses.title: AGY-102: The UI Landscape & Selection
courses.description: A comparative tour of Google Antigravity's three main interfaces: the standalone visual board (antigravity), the lightweight command line (agy), and the agent-powered VS Code workspace editor (antigravity-ide).

courses.title: AGY-103: Workspace Design & File Security
courses.description: Learn to design secure workspace boundaries and configure file-system level access controls for autonomous AI agents, including directory locking, permissions, and custom system-level firewalls.

courses.title: AGY-104: Agent-Human Collaboration Loops
courses.description: Constructing clear instructions, managing terminal execution approvals, and learning how to safely pause, redirect, and resume an agent task under human-in-the-loop validation.

courses.title: AGY-201: Standalone Operations
courses.description: Managing asynchronous agent boards, prompt engineering for document generation, and tracking web-scraper visual playback tapes inside the standalone antigravity app.

courses.title: AGY-202: AGY CLI Operations
courses.description: Mastering global command line syntax, piping local folder inputs, executing bulk file modifications, and running rapid query batch jobs inside the agy terminal command line.

courses.title: AGY-203: Interactive Workspaces
courses.description: Synchronous side-by-side co-authoring, workspace markdown navigation, and live text rewriting or code refactoring inside the antigravity-ide VS Code extension environment.

courses.title: AGY-311: Scripting with the SDK
courses.description: Programmatic automation. Triggering agent cycles, passing context arrays, and handling structured outputs using Python and Node.js SDK libraries.

courses.title: AGY-411: Custom MCP Servers
courses.description: Designing, hosting, and deploying custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to let agents safely read and write to custom databases and enterprise API endpoints.

courses.title: AGY-321: Jules VM Orchestration
courses.description: Spawning Jules virtual machine instances to run complex, isolated build pipelines and testing jobs across remote pools under architectural guidelines.

courses.title: AGY-421: Enterprise Governance & Rules
courses.description: Codifying compliance guidelines, security boundaries, and architectural patterns inside local workspace .gemini.md rules for high-autonomy agents.

courses.title: AGY-331: Advanced Container Sandboxing
courses.description: Configuring local distrobox or devcontainers environments using the portable agy-box OCI image to run high-autonomy agent loops under container protection.

courses.title: AGY-431: Scale & Immutable DevOps
courses.description: Deploying agy-box images to remote cloud VMs, setting up private container registries under corporate proxies, and running headless pipeline runs.
